# BEKeyModifierFlags.none

**Case**

There aren’t any active key modifiers.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Getting caps-shift information

- **BEKeyModifierFlags.capsLock**: The caps lock is engaged.
- **BEKeyModifierFlags.shift**: The shift key is pressed down.

items.description: The shift key is pressed down.
items.name: BEKeyModifierFlags.shift

title: BEKeyModifierFlags.none
